Walls may be formed by pleura, septa,or compressed lung tissue.

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Dähnert W. Radiology Review Manual, 6th ed., p.434
questions.explanation:
**Bulla 應為薄壁(<1mm)或無明顯可辨壁，而非壁厚>1mm**。

(A) **正解（非bulla的定義）**:bulla壁應<1mm或無明顯壁。
(B) 正確:bulla本質為肺內含氣空間。
(C) 正確:兩個以上稱bullae。
(D) 正確:壁可由肋膜/間隔/壓縮肺組織構成。

→ [[pulmonary-bulla-cyst-definitions]]

questions.questionText: 關於 fibromuscular dysplasia(FMD)，下列何者有誤?

options.text: 好發於年輕女性
最常影響 renal artery
Intracranial FMD 可以SAH表現
少以 vascular ectasia 表現

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解（FMD標準教材）
questions.explanation:
**血管迂曲、紡錘狀血管擴張與string-of-beads為FMD的典型表現，非少見**。

(A) 正確:好發年輕女性。
(B) 正確:最常影響腎動脈。
(C) 正確:顱內FMD可以SAH表現（雖屬較不典型）。
(D) **有誤（正解）**:vascular ectasia為典型表現，非少見。

→ [[renal-artery-stenosis]]

questions.questionText: 關於 coronary arteriovenous fistula (AVF)，下列何者有誤?

options.text: drainage site 最常為 right ventricle
多半為 single communications
成人多為 asymptomatic
Left-to-right shunt ratio 與症狀無關

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解（冠狀動脈瘻管標準教材）
questions.explanation:
**經由冠狀動脈竊血(coronary artery steal)現象，分流比例與症狀發展有關**。

(A) 正確:引流最常為右心室。
(B) 正確:多半單一交通。
(C) 正確:成人多無症狀（兒童相對較低）。
(D) **有誤（正解）**:分流比例與症狀有關，非無關。

→ [[coronary-av-fistula]]

questions.questionText: 關於 Standing (or Stationary) arterial wave，下列何者錯誤?

options.text: 與 MR angiography 相比，較常見於 conventional angiography.
為 benign phenomenon 而無顯著臨床意義.
僅發生於下肢血管.
有時會被誤認為 fibromuscular dysplasia

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解（血管攝影標準教材）
questions.explanation:
**多數描述於周邊動脈整體，非侷限下肢血管**。

(A) 正確:較常見於conventional angiography（導管誘發機轉）。
(B) 正確:屬良性現象，無顯著臨床意義。
(C) **錯誤（正解）**:非僅下肢，多描述於周邊動脈。
(D) 正確:有時被誤認為FMD。

→ [[standing-arterial-wave]]

questions.questionText: 關於 transarterial embolization (TAE) for post-partum hemorrhage (PPH) 下列何者錯誤?

options.text: Bleeding sources 主要是 uterine arteries 或 ovarian arteries.
若 hysterectomy 後仍在出血, sole source 為 ovarian arteries.
使用 coils 較 gelfoam 容易失敗.
目前對 menopause 和 pregnancy 無顯著影響.

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；J Vasc Interv Radiol 2011;22:169-176
questions.explanation:
**主要出血來源為子宮動脈(uterine artery)**，卵巢/圓韌帶動脈為主要側枝吻合來源而非出血源。

(A) **錯誤（正解）**:主要出血源僅為uterine artery，非uterine與ovarian arteries並列。
(B) 正確:子宮切除後持續出血非單純卵巢動脈為唯一來源。
(C) 正確:coils較gelfoam容易栓塞失敗。
(D) 正確:目前對停經/懷孕無顯著不良影響。

→ [[postpartum-hemorrhage-embolization]]

questions.questionText: 關於 Deep vein thrombosis (DVT) in lower extremities 下列何者錯誤?

options.text: 男性略多於女性
以 Catheter-directed thrombolysis 方式治療,可降低使用 thrombolytic agent 的 dosage
進行 Catheter-directed thrombolysis 前，安裝 IVC filter 可降低 pulmonary embolism 的可能性
postoperative patients 發生 calf vein DVT 時，需緊急以 Catheter-directed thrombolysis 治療，以降低 pulmonary embolism 的可能性

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解（下肢DVT管理標準教材）
questions.explanation:
**Calf vein DVT屬遠端DVT，臨床意義有限**，非緊急溶栓適應症（溶栓保留給phlegmasia cerulea dolens/大範圍髂股DVT/抗凝失敗者）。

(A) 正確:男性略高於女性（~18%）。
(B) 正確:導管導引可降低溶栓劑量。
(C) 正確:溶栓前置IVC filter可降低PE風險。
(D) **錯誤（正解）**:calf vein DVT非緊急溶栓適應症。

→ [[dvt-management-thrombolysis]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following groups should begin screening for colorectal carcinoma at age 50?

options.text: Patients with polyposis syndrome
Patients with family history of colon cancer
Asymptomatic patients with no known risk factors
Patients with prior history of colon cancer
Patients with heme-positive stools

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Radiology: Specialty Board Review, GI Section Ch.48, p.375
questions.explanation:
**一般族群（無症狀無風險因子）從50歲開始篩檢**。

(A) 息肉症候群:需自青少年期即開始篩檢。
(B) 家族史:通常提早開始。
(C) **正解**:一般族群篩檢起始年齡。
(D) 個人病史:依術後監測時程追蹤。
(E) heme-positive stools:症狀性,需立即檢查。

→ [[colorectal-cancer-screening]]

questions.questionText: Which is not predominantly an ileocolonic disease?

options.text: Tuberculosis
Campylobacter
Crohn Disease
Giardia
Typhlitis

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Radiology: Specialty Board Review, GI Section Ch.48, p.375
questions.explanation:
**Giardia 主要侵犯近端小腸，非迴結腸為主**。

(A) Tuberculosis、(C) Crohn Disease、(E) Typhlitis:皆好發迴結腸區域。
(B) Campylobacter:好發右側結腸。
(D) **正解**:Giardia侵犯近端小腸,非迴結腸。

→ [[gi-infection-location-pattern]]

questions.questionText: Concerning the appendix, which of the following is true?

options.text: Contains taeniae coli
Most commonly retrocecal
Directed toward the side of the ileocecal valve
Supplied by branch of the inferior mesenteric artery
Does not contain a serosal layer

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Radiology: Specialty Board Review, GI Section Ch.48, p.378
questions.explanation:
⚠️ 官方答案標示存疑（原標C後改註B?），依解剖教材最支持者為**Most commonly retrocecal（B，約65-70%）**。

(A) 闌尾壁本身不含獨立teniae coli構造。
(B) **正解**:retrocecal最常見位置。
(C) 根部位於迴盲瓣下方2-3cm,非直接指向其側。
(D) 血供來自SMA,非IMA。
(E) 闌尾具漿膜層覆蓋。

→ [[appendix-anatomy]]

questions.questionText: What portion of the liver is not covered by visceral peritoneum?

options.text: Porta hepatis, caudal right hepatic lobe, and the bare area
Bare area, porta hepatis, and the gallbladder bed
Bare area, hepatic dome, and lateral segment
Porta hepatis, hepatic dome, and gallbladder bed

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Radiology: Specialty Board Review, Ch.51 Biliary System, p.387
questions.explanation:
**未被臟層腹膜覆蓋的肝臟部位為 bare area、porta hepatis、gallbladder bed**。

(A)(C)(D) 皆混入 caudal right hepatic lobe/hepatic dome/lateral segment,這些為一般表面仍被腹膜覆蓋。
(B) **正解**。

→ [[liver-peritoneal-anatomy]]

questions.questionText: What percentage of patients with acute cholecystitis have no gallstones?
questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Radiology: Specialty Board Review, Ch.51 Biliary System, p.397
questions.explanation:
**急性非結石性膽囊炎占急性膽囊炎約5-10%（列在10%組距）**，好發重症加護病人。

(A) **正解**。
(B)(C)(D) 皆高估。

→ [[acalculous-cholecystitis]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statement about decidualized endometriotic cyst is FALSE?

options.text: All decidualized components on the wall of the endometriotic cyst is considered as low-growing component along the cystic wall or the intracystic septa
The solid component of decidualized endometriotic cysts has higher signal intensity on T2-weighted images as compared with those associated with carcinomas
The ectopic decidua showed significantly higher ADC value than the carcinomas

In the setting of gynecological pathology, a number of studies have sought to differentiate benign lesions from malignant lesions, both uterine and ovarian, using DWI values as a distinguishing parameter

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；J Comput Assist Tomogr 2014;38(6):879-884
questions.explanation:
⚠️ 官方答案為D。依所附段落，A（蛻膜化組件定義）、B（T2蛻膜化略高於惡性）、C（ADC值蛻膜化顯著高於惡性）皆為文獻支持的正確敘述。DWI高訊號本身對蛻膜化組織與惡性皆非特異，需靠ADC定量值鑑別（蛻膜化顯著較高）。D為研究背景性描述，確切被判偽理由建議醫師對照原文全段確認。

→ [[decidualized-endometriotic-cyst]]

questions.questionText: Which of the below are not characteristic findings of endometriomas?

options.text: A cystic lesion hyperintense on T1WI with "shading" or relative hypointense on T2WI images
Multiple hyperintense lesions on T1WI
Cystic lesions hyperintense on T1WI and hyperintense without shading on T2WI (old haemorrhage occasionally appears hyperintense)
Flow voids within the cystic lesion

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Radiology: Specialty Board Review, GYN Section
questions.explanation:
**D（囊內流空訊號 flow voids）非典型**——endometrioma為無血管性囊腫，內部不應出現流空訊號。

(A) T1高訊號伴shading或相對T2低訊號:典型。
(B) 多發T1高訊號病灶:典型。
(C) T1/T2高訊號無shading(舊出血):可見。
(D) **正解**:無血管性囊腫不應有流空訊號。

→ [[endometrioma]]

questions.questionText: What is the most common carcinoma the may develop from ovarian endometriosis?

options.text: Clear cell adenocarcinoma
Endometrioid adenocarcinoma
Serous cystadenocarcinoma
Mucinous cystadenocarcinoma

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Radiology: Specialty Board Review, GYN Section
questions.explanation:
⚠️ 官方答案原標A後更正為**B（Endometrioid adenocarcinoma，約2/3最常見）**。

(A) Clear cell adenocarcinoma:第二常見(約1/7)。
(B) **正解**:子宮內膜異位症惡性轉化最常見組織型。
(C)(D) Serous/mucinous:與子宮內膜異位症關聯性遠低於前兩者。

→ [[endometriosis-malignant-transformation]]

questions.questionText: Which is the most common site of extragenital endometriosis?

options.text: Ileum
Rectum and rectosigmoid junction
Abdominal wall
Lung

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Radiology: Specialty Board Review, GYN Section
questions.explanation:
**B（Rectum and rectosigmoid junction）**——GI侵犯中最常見部位（注意為GI侵犯內排序，非全身最常見；全身以卵巢約75%最常見）。

(A) Ileum:GI侵犯排序中較後。
(B) **正解**。
(C) Abdominal wall:剖腹產疤痕相關，較少見。
(D) Lung:罕見部位。

→ [[endometriosis-extragenital-sites]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following about Foot Charcot Arthropathy is FALSE?

options.text: Most common secondary to diabetes
Foot frequently shows ulceration
Usually first involves metaphysis of MT joint (reabsorption of the ends of the affected bone)
Usually involves MTP joint with astonishing joint destruction on initial radiograph

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Radiology: Specialty Board Review, MSK Section
questions.explanation:
**C為偽**——病變最初侵犯**1st MTP joint**，表現為受侵犯骨端**reabsorption**（非蹠骨metaphysis破壞）。

(A) 糖尿病最常見病因:真。
(B) 足部常見潰瘍:真。
(C) **正解(偽)**:最初侵犯MTP關節非metaphysis。
(D) MTP關節初診即顯著破壞:真。

→ [[charcot-arthropathy-foot]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following about Multiple Myeloma is FALSE?

options.text: Men much more common than women
Mandible involved in 1/3 of patients with diffuse involvement (Bony metastases rarely involve mandible, distal axial skeleton)
Sclerosis is usually seen only with treatment or fracture
In spine, MM destroys body and pedicle

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Radiology: Specialty Board Review, MSK Section
questions.explanation:
**D為偽**——脊椎MM典型**侵犯椎體但保留椎弓根**（骨轉移則常侵犯椎弓根，為鑑別重點）。

(A) 男性好發:真。
(B) 約1/3侵犯下頜骨:真。
(C) 硬化僅見治療後或骨折:真。
(D) **正解(偽)**:MM保留椎弓根,非破壞。

→ [[multiple-myeloma-vs-bone-metastasis]]

questions.questionText: The double posterior cruciate ligament (PCL) sign is a highly specific indicator of the following meniscal tear.

options.text: Bucket-handle tear
Discoid meniscal tear
Flipped meniscal tear
Meniscal root tear

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Radiology: Specialty Board Review, MSK Section
questions.explanation:
**A（Bucket-handle tear）**——內側半月板桶柄狀撕裂碎片移位至髁間窩、平行PCL下方，幾乎僅見於ACL完整病人。

(A) **正解**。
(B)(C)(D) 皆非此徵象對應之撕裂型態。

→ [[meniscal-tear-mri-signs]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is TRUE about ankle Mortise-view radiograph?

options.text: It is an AP-view taken with a 90 degrees endorotation of the foot
The technologist turns the foot outwards (inward) until the medial malleolus is at the same height as the lateral malleolus
This view visualizes both the lateral and medial joint spaces
The talus overlaps a portion of the lateral malleolus, obscuring the lateral aspect of the ankle joint (in AP view)

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；MSK 攝影技術附圖
questions.explanation:
**C（同時顯示內外側關節間隙）為真**。

(A) 為15-20度內轉oblique,非90度AP旋轉。
(B) 應為內轉(inward)非外轉(outwards)。
(C) **正解**:Mortise view核心優勢。
(D) 此為標準AP view的特性(距骨遮蔽外髁)，非Mortise view的敘述。

→ [[ankle-mortise-view]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is TRUE about compartment syndrome?

options.text: Necrosis of tissue may begin at interstitial pressure as low as 50 mmHg (above): pressure higher than 30 mmHg of the diastolic pressure is associated with compartment syndrome; for those with hypotension, a pressure of 20 mmHg higher than the intra-compartmental pressure is associated with compartment syndrome
Compartment syndrome is not a life-threatening condition
It progresses to rhabdomyolysis if untreated
A fasciotomy procedure with incision in the skin and the muscle fibers (fascia) is necessary to release the pressure and regain normal function of the arteries

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；MSK Section
questions.explanation:
**C（未治療進展為橫紋肌溶解症）為真**。

(A) 診斷閾值應以delta pressure(舒張壓−腔室壓)<20-30mmHg為準,非單純腔室壓絕對值。
(B) 為危及生命之急症,非「非致命」。
(C) **正解**。
(D) 筋膜切開術切開皮膚與筋膜(fascia),非肌肉纖維。

→ [[compartment-syndrome-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which artery does not supply the internal border zone?

options.text: Recurrent artery of Heubner
Lenticulostriate artery
Middle cerebral artery
Anterior choroidal artery
Superior hypophyseal artery

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；NR Section
questions.explanation:
**E（Superior hypophyseal artery）**——供應下視丘/漏斗部,與大腦內側分水嶺區灌流無關。

(A)(B)(D) 皆為供應內側分水嶺區的穿通動脈。
(C) MCA為這些穿通動脈的來源動脈,亦參與供血。
(E) **正解**。

→ [[cerebral-border-zone-infarct-arteries]]

questions.questionText: Which one of the following description concerning lacunar infarction is wrong?

options.text: Ischemia of deep perforators from arterial circle of Willis, the anterior choroidal artery, or the basilar artery
The most frequently affected perforating arteries include the lenticulostriate, the thalamoperforate and the perforators arising from the anterior choroidal artery
Maximum size of the infarction in the acute stage is 15 mm (some sources say 20mm)
Most first-ever symptomatic lacunar infarcts are located in the area supplied by the anterior choroidal artery (posterior limb of internal capsule)
Most lacunar infarcts are asymptomatic

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；NR Section
questions.explanation:
⚠️ 官方答案為C,但官方詳解本身亦標註此數值文獻不一(15mm或20mm),建議醫師核對原文確認真正錯誤理由。

(A)(B) 深部穿通動脈供血:真。
(C) **正解(標示為錯)**:最大範圍數值有爭議。
(D) 內囊後肢為首次症狀性腔隙梗塞好發部位:真。
(E) 多數無症狀:真。

→ [[lacunar-infarction]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statements about subependymomas is FALSE?

options.text: It is thought that they arise from the subependymal glial layer surrounding the cerebral ventricles, but the exact histogenesis remains uncertain
Enhancement is variable, with most lesions demonstrating no or minimal enhancement

Invasion into the brain parenchyma usually occurs, and it is often for there to be adjacent T2 hyperintensity in the periventricular white matter (unlike ependymomas, no invasion into brain parenchyma occurs, and it is rare for adjacent T2 hyperintensity)
No CSF dissemination occurs. Rarely, multiple subependymomas may be present

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Intraventricular Neoplasms: Radiologic-Pathologic Correlation, RadioGraphics 2013;33:21-43
questions.explanation:
**C為偽**——subependymoma不侵犯腦實質,周邊白質很少出現T2高訊號(與ependymoma相反)。

(A) 組織起源不確定:真。
(B) 強化多變但多無/輕微強化:真。
(C) **正解(偽)**。
(D) 無CSF散播偶可多發:真。

→ [[subependymoma]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statements about central neurocytoma is FALSE?

options.text: Central neurocytomas are well-circumscribed, lobulated masses that frequently have cystlike areas
The term central neurocytoma is exclusively reserved for neurocytomas that occur in the ventricular system
At contrast-enhanced imaging, the enhancement pattern is variable, but moderate to strong enhancement is typically seen
Recent evaluation with MR spectroscopy has revealed the presence of glutamine (glycine, 3.55 ppm) within central neurocytomas which help differentiate them from other intraventricular neoplasm

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Intraventricular Neoplasms: Radiologic-Pathologic Correlation, RadioGraphics 2013;33:21-43
questions.explanation:
**D為偽**——MRS鑑別特徵峰為glycine(3.55 ppm),非glutamine。

(A) 邊界清楚分葉狀伴囊狀變:真。
(B) 命名專指腦室內病灶:真。
(C) 強化多變但典型中重度強化:真。
(D) **正解(偽)**:應為glycine非glutamine。

→ [[central-neurocytoma]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statements about Paget disease involving petrous apex is FALSE?

options.text: Characterized by production of dense fragile bone formed by alternating episodes of excessive abnormal osteoclastic and osteoblastic activity
The disease may be polyostotic or monostotic and typically will involve the facial bones (usually involves the calvaria, skull base, and temporal bones)
It can divided into 4 phases: osteolytic, mixed, sclerotic and remodeling phase
MR imaging shows heterogeneous signal intensity on T1- and T2-weighted images with heterogeneous enhancement in involved bone

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Lesions of the Petrous Apex: Classification and Findings at CT and MR Imaging, RadioGraphics 2012;32:151-173
questions.explanation:
**B為偽**——Paget disease典型侵犯顱蓋、顱底、顳骨,非「顏面骨」。

(A) 硬化/溶骨交替活動:真。
(B) **正解(偽)**:應為calvaria/skull base/temporal bones。
(C) 四期分類:真。
(D) MR訊號與強化不均:真。

→ [[paget-disease-bone]]

questions.questionText: A 13-year-old male presents with recurrent epistaxis. CT shows a highly vascular mass in the nasopharynx, with widening of the pterygopalatine fossa and invasion of the sphenoid sinus. Which arterial branch is the feeding vessel likely to be arising from?

options.text: ascending pharyngeal artery
facial artery
Superficial temporal artery
Internal maxillary artery
Internal carotid artery

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Radiology Review Manual, 6th ed., p.387
questions.explanation:
**D（Internal maxillary artery）**——JNA主要供血來自同側IMA遠端分支(尤其sphenopalatine、descending palatine、posterior superior alveolar)。

(A) Ascending pharyngeal artery:可提供次要供血,非主要。
(B)(C)(E) 皆非JNA主要供血動脈。
(D) **正解**。

→ [[juvenile-nasopharyngeal-angiofibroma]]

questions.questionText: A 10-year-old girl presents with right hip pain. Which of the following radiographic features makes the diagnosis of SUFE more likely than Perthes' disease?

options.text: Reduction in size of the proximal femoral epiphysis
Loss of overlap between the medial femoral metaphysis and acetabulum (loss of triangular sign of Capener)
Regional femoral demineralization
A crescent of subcortical lucency in the femoral head
Fragmentation of the femoral head

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Radiology Review Manual, 6th edition, p.74-75
questions.explanation:
**B（內側股骨頸幹端與髖臼重疊消失，Capener三角徵消失）**——反映骨骺實質滑脫，為SUFE特異性徵象。

(A)(C)(D)(E) 骨骺縮小、局部去礦質化、軟骨下新月狀透亮、碎裂皆為Perthes disease缺血性壞死重塑過程的典型表現。
(B) **正解**。

→ [[sufe-vs-perthes-disease]]

questions.questionText: A 15-year-old boy presents with severe abdominal pain. He has a known history of a polyposis syndrome. KUB shows small bowel obstruction, a subsequent abdominal CT scan indicates that this is due to a small bowel intussusception. Which "polyposis" syndrome does he most probably have?

options.text: Cronkhite-Canada syndrome (stomach, colon hamartomatous polyps)
Familial adenomatous polyposis syndrome (colonic adenomatous polyps)
Cowden syndrome (terminal ileum and colon hamartomatous polyps)
Gardner's syndrome (colonic adenomatous polyps)
Peutz-Jeghers syndrome (intestinal hamartomatous polyps)

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Radiology Review Manual, 6th edition, p.862-863
questions.explanation:
**E（Peutz-Jeghers syndrome）**——錯構瘤性息肉體積大易誘發小腸套疊。

(A) Cronkhite-Canada:非遺傳性,好發胃/大腸,不伴惡性風險增加。
(B)(D) FAP/Gardner:腺瘤性息肉,非以套疊為主要特徵。
(C) Cowden:好發末端迴腸/大腸錯構瘤性息肉,非以套疊為主要特徵。
(E) **正解**:PJS息肉本身非癌前病變,但仍伴GI腺癌及腸外惡性腫瘤風險。

→ [[polyposis-syndromes-gi]]

questions.questionText: An infant with ambiguous genitalia is referred for ultrasound of pelvis. This shows a normal uterus and ovaries, suggesting female pseudohermaphroditism. There is elevated 17-hydroxy-progesterone. What further evaluation is recommended?

options.text: Ultrasound of adrenal gland
MRI of pelvis
CT of abdomen and pelvis
Laparoscopy
Ultrasound of inguinal region

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；RadioGraphics 2008;28:1891-1904
questions.explanation:
**A（腎上腺超音波）**——CAH疑診時腎上腺超音波為首選影像工具。

(A) **正解**:評估雙側腎上腺大小(肢長≥20mm、肢寬≥4mm)、表面輪廓(分葉/腦回狀)與回音特徵。
(B)(C)(D)(E) 皆非CAH疑診時的首選/下一步檢查。

→ [[congenital-adrenal-hyperplasia]]

questions.questionText: An 8-month-old female had been crying inconsolably for 12 hours during which time she had passed at least two bloodstained stools. She was admitted to hospital and a plain abdominal radiograph showed a soft mass in the right upper quadrant which corresponded to a fullness of the abdomen on physical examination. An ultrasound was performed which showed a 'pseudokidney' in this region. What is the most likely diagnosis?

options.text: Ileocolic intussusception
Ileoileocolic intussusception
Mid-gut volvulus
Ileo-ileal intussusception
Pyloric stenosis

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Final FRCR Part A Modules 1-3 Single Best Answer MCQs, Robin Proctor, p.122
questions.explanation:
**A（Ileocolic intussusception）**——兒童腸套疊最常見型態,超音波假腎徵/靶徵為特徵性表現。

(A) **正解**。
(B)(D) 迴迴結腸型/迴迴腸型較少見。
(C) 中腸扭轉好發更早,常合併腸旋轉不良病史。
(E) 幽門狹窄臨床表現為噴射性嘔吐非血便。

→ [[pediatric-intussusception-types]]

questions.questionText: Following a holiday in South-East Asia, a 33-year-old man presented with abdominal pain. Ultrasound demonstrated an echo-poor lesion within the right lobe of the liver which contained several smaller internal cysts. What is the most likely diagnosis?

options.text: Amoebic abscess
Echinococcus
Pyogenic abscess
Polycystic liver disease
Haemangioma

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Final FRCR Part A Modules 1-3 Single Best Answer MCQs, Robin Proctor, p.126
questions.explanation:
**B（Echinococcus）**——子囊(daughter cysts,honeycomb/rosette狀)為肝包蟲病(CE2型)特徵性超音波表現。

(A) Amoebic abscess:無子囊結構。
(B) **正解**。
(C) Pyogenic abscess:臨床常伴發燒感染徵象。
(D) Polycystic liver disease:囊腫間無母子關係。
(E) Haemangioma:血管性病灶非囊性。

→ [[hepatic-hydatid-cyst]]

questions.questionText: A 58-year-old African woman developed right upper quadrant pain. Ultrasound showed a grossly cirrhotic liver with markedly hyperechoic septa separating areas of relatively normal liver, recognized as a 'turtle back' appearance. What is the most likely underlying diagnosis?

options.text: Amoebiasis
Hydatid
Lymphoma
Schistosomiasis
Tuberculosis

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Final FRCR Part A Modules 1-3 Single Best Answer MCQs, Robin Proctor, p.127
questions.explanation:
**D（Schistosomiasis）**——高回音間隔分隔正常肝實質形成turtle back appearance,反映門脈周圍pipestem fibrosis。

(A) Amoebiasis:典型呈肝膿瘍非纖維化間隔。
(B) Hydatid:呈囊性病灶伴子囊。
(C) Lymphoma:呈局部/瀰漫低回音病灶。
(D) **正解**。
(E) Tuberculosis:可呈粟粒狀病灶或膿瘍非turtle back紋路。

→ [[hepatic-schistosomiasis]]

questions.questionText: A 40-year-old woman presents with a palpable breast lump for several weeks. On examination, a firm, relatively mobile mass is palpable in the left upper outer quadrant. Mammograms demonstrated a well-circumscribed round soft-tissue density in the upper outer quadrant of the left breast. What feature on ultrasound would favor a diagnosis of a breast cyst above that of fibroadenoma?

options.text: Multiple bilateral lesions of similar appearance
Internal calcification
A round hypoechoic lesion with a smooth well-defined margin
A hypoechoic lesion with internal echoes homogeneously distributed within the lesion
A hyperechoic posterior wall

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Final FRCR Part A Modules 4-6 Single Best Answer MCQs, Robin Proctor, p.11
questions.explanation:
**E（後方音波增強 hyperechoic posterior wall）**——單純囊腫因液體低衰減之特徵性表現,纖維腺瘤為實質腫塊通常無此表現。

(A)(B)(C)(D) 皆非cyst特有,纖維腺瘤亦可具備類似特徵。
(E) **正解**。

→ [[breast-cystic-lesions]]

questions.questionText: A 30-year-old female patient with pelvic pain and irregular periods underwent an ultrasound examination. In the left ovary there was a 4-cm diffuse homogeneous hypoechoic focal lesion with low-level internal echoes. What is the most likely diagnosis?

options.text: Endometrioma
Functional ovarian cyst
Polycystic ovary (PCOS)
Ovarian carcinoma
Corpus luteum

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Final FRCR Part A Modules 4-6 Single Best Answer MCQs, Robin Proctor, p.17
questions.explanation:
**A（Endometrioma）**——均勻分佈的低位準內部回音(毛玻璃樣外觀)為endometrioma超音波典型特徵性表現。

(A) **正解**。
(B) Functional cyst:多為完全無回音。
(C) PCOS:多發周邊小濾泡非單一均質病灶。
(D) Ovarian carcinoma:常伴實質成分及血流。
(E) Corpus luteum:常呈環狀血流(ring of fire)。

→ [[endometrioma]]

questions.questionText: Which statement of extraadrenal paraganglioma is wrong?

options.text: Most arise in fourth or fifth decades in life
Carney's triad consists of extraadrenal paraganglioma, pulmonary chondroma and gastrointestinal stromal tumor (gastric GIST)
Hyperintense on T2-weighted MR images
These tumors are frequently found in the organs of Zuckerkandl

questions.explanation:
**B為偽**——Carney triad正確組成為gastric GIST(非泛指一般消化道基質瘤)、pulmonary chondroma、extraadrenal paraganglioma。

(A) 多數40-50歲診斷:真。
(B) **正解(偽)**:應specifically為gastric GIST。
(C) T2高訊號:真。
(D) 好發Zuckerkandl器官:真。

→ [[extraadrenal-paraganglioma]]

questions.questionText: Which statement of malignant melanoma in the head is wrong?

options.text: Include the melanotic and amelanotic patterns
High signal intensity on T1-weighted images of melanotic pattern
Low signal intensity on T2-weighted images of amelanotic pattern
None of above

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；RadioGraphics 2001;21:625-639
questions.explanation:
⚠️ 官方原答案標示B、後更正為C為偽。

(A) 包含melanotic與amelanotic兩型態:真。
(B) Melanotic pattern T1高訊號:真(黑色素順磁效應)。
(C) **正解(偽)**:Amelanotic pattern於T2WI應呈高至等訊號,非低訊號。
(D) 不適用。

→ [[head-melanoma-mri-signal]]

questions.questionText: Some hepatocellular carcinoma show paradoxical uptake in hepatobiliary phase in liver MRI, which statement for these lesions is wrong?

options.text: Higher expression of MRP3 transporter
Lower expression of OATP8 transporter
Impairment of bile secretion by tumor compression
None of above

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；European Society of Radiology, ECR 2014, C-0963
questions.explanation:
**B為偽**——矛盾攝取HCC之機轉為OATP8表現量『升高』(非降低),搭配MRP2表現量降低致對比劑細胞質滯留。

(A) MRP3表現量升高:真。
(B) **正解(偽)**:應為OATP8升高非降低。
(C) 腫瘤壓迫致膽汁分泌障礙:真。
(D) 不適用。

→ [[hepatobiliary-mri-contrast]]

questions.questionText: Which of following vasculitis is large-vessel involved vasculitis?

options.text: Polyarteritis nodosa
Giant cell arteritis
Granulomatosis with polyangiitis
Eosinophilic granulomatosis with polyangiitis

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；RadioGraphics 2014;34:873-894
questions.explanation:
**B（Giant cell arteritis）**——大血管炎僅含Takayasu arteritis與giant cell arteritis。

(A) Polyarteritis nodosa:中血管炎。
(B) **正解**。
(C)(D) GPA/EGPA:皆屬ANCA associated小血管炎。

→ [[pulmonary-vasculitis-classification]]

questions.questionText: To differentiate radiation necrosis and brain tumor recurrence, which is not the characteristics for radiation necrosis?

options.text: Radiation necrosis can be suspected by location of primary tumor and radiation port
Radiation necrosis has higher lesion quotient in MR image
Periventricular enhancing foci within the radiation port are typical of radiation-induced enhancement
An enhancing area with a "cut green pepper" or "soap bubble" appearance may suggest radiation necrosis

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；RadioGraphics 2012;32:1343-1359
questions.explanation:
**B為偽**——腫瘤復發的lesion quotient較放射線壞死『高』(復發>0.6、放射線壞死<0.3),非放射線壞死較高。

(A) 可依原發腫瘤位置與照野推測:真。
(B) **正解(偽)**。
(C) 腦室旁強化灶典型提示放射線引起:真。
(D) cut green pepper/soap bubble外觀可提示放射線壞死:真(但研究顯示不可靠鑑別)。

→ [[radiation-necrosis-vs-tumor-recurrence]]

questions.questionText: Which statement of abnormal placental attachment is wrong?

options.text: Placenta percreta means villi partially invades myometrium
Prior cesarean section and placenta previa are the two most important risk factors
MR image can provide information on depth of invasion and more clearly depict posterior placentas than ultrasound
MR imaging findings are uterine bulging, heterogeneous placenta, and placental bands

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；RadioGraphics 2008;28:1905-1916
questions.explanation:
**A為偽**——Placenta percreta定義為絨毛侵犯至或超過子宮漿膜層(非部分侵入肌層,此為increta的定義)。

(A) **正解(偽)**。
(B) 前次剖腹產與前置胎盤為最重要危險因子:真。
(C) MRI較超音波更清楚顯示後壁胎盤並評估侵犯深度:真。
(D) MRI表現含子宮膨出/胎盤訊號不均/帶狀構造:真。

→ [[placenta-accreta-spectrum]]

questions.questionText: Which statement of neurovascular compression syndrome caused trigeminal neuralgia is wrong?

options.text: More often involving maxillary branch
Left side of the face being affected more commonly
Peak around 60 to 70 years old
Involved artery: SCA > AICA > VA/BA

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；AJNR Published February 18, 2016 as 10.3174
questions.explanation:
**B為偽**——右側臉部受累較常見(1.5:1,非左側),僅約3%為雙側。

(A) 上頷支最常受累:真。
(B) **正解(偽)**:應為右側較常見。
(C) 60-70歲高峰:真。
(D) 受累血管SCA>AICA>VA/BA:真。

→ [[trigeminal-neuralgia-neurovascular-compression]]

questions.questionText: Moyamoya disease is related to following disease except

options.text: Sickle cell anemia
Down syndrome
Marfan syndrome
Coarctation of the aorta
All above are related

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；RadioGraphics 2014;34:873-894
questions.explanation:
**E（All above are related）**——Sickle cell anemia、Down syndrome、Marfan syndrome、主動脈弓縮窄皆與moyamoya病有關聯記載(縮窄關聯性文獻報告較少見但仍存在),故答案為全部皆有關。

→ [[moyamoya]]

questions.questionText: About KAWASAKI disease, which following is not true

options.text: Mostly involve superficial temporal artery (Giant cell arteritis)
Mostly involve medium-sized arteries
May cause coronary dilatation with aneurysm
Up to 30% of patients exhibit involvement of the CNS

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；RadioGraphics 2014;34:873-894
questions.explanation:
**A為偽**——川崎病並非主要侵犯顳淺動脈(此為giant cell arteritis的特徵)。

(A) **正解(偽)**。
(B) 屬中血管血管炎:真。
(C) 可致冠狀動脈擴張伴動脈瘤:真。
(D) 中樞神經系統侵犯比例:另一常見誤答陷阱選項。

→ [[kawasaki-disease-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which following description about Congenital diaphragmatic hernia (CDH) is not true

options.text: Bochdalek's hernia is usually involved left-posterior diaphragm
Bochdalek's hernia is most common type of CDH
Morgagni hernia is usually involved right-posterior diaphragm (anterior, right-sided ~90%, small, rare ~2% of CDH, at low risk of prolapse)
CNS abnormality is associated

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Primer of Diagnostic Imaging, 5th edition, p.580-581
questions.explanation:
**C為偽**——Morgagni hernia為前方(非後方)缺損,好發右側(約90%)。

(A)(B) Bochdalek's hernia左後外側且最常見:真。
(C) **正解(偽)**:應為前方非後方。
(D) CDH可合併CNS異常(約10%非症候群性病例):真。

→ [[congenital-diaphragmatic-hernia]]

questions.questionText: About Achondroplasia, which of following is not true

options.text: Rhizomelic dwarfism
The interpedicular distance widening distally (progressive decrease in the interpedicular distance in the lumbar spine)
Trident hand
Short and stubby fingers (bullet-shaped)

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Primer of Diagnostic Imaging, 5th edition, p.618
questions.explanation:
**B為偽**——腰椎椎弓根間距應由頭側向尾側漸進縮小(非漸進增寬,與正常脊椎相反)。

(A) Rhizomelic dwarfism:真。
(B) **正解(偽)**。
(C) Trident hand:真。
(D) Bullet-shaped短粗手指:真。

→ [[achondroplasia]]

questions.questionText: Which of following structure is not part of lesser omentum?

options.text: Gastrohepatic ligament
Hepatoduodenal ligament
Common bile duct
Gastrosplenic ligament

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；RadioGraphics 2012;32:437-451
questions.explanation:
**D（Gastrosplenic ligament）**——胃脾韌帶屬大網膜,非小網膜組成。

(A)(B) 小網膜由肝胃韌帶+肝十二指腸韌帶組成:真。
(C) 肝十二指腸韌帶內含總膽管:真。
(D) **正解**。

→ [[peritoneal-ligaments-and-spaces]]

questions.questionText: Which of following ligament is landmark between left subphrenic space and left paracolic gutter?

options.text: Gastrosplenic ligament
Phrenicocolic ligament
Splenorenal ligament
Gastrocolic ligament

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；RadioGraphics 2012;32:437-451
questions.explanation:
**B（Phrenicocolic ligament，Hensing's韌帶）**——連結結腸脾彎曲至橫膈,為左膈下腔隙與左結腸旁溝的解剖界標。

(A)(C)(D) 皆非此界標韌帶。
(B) **正解**。

→ [[peritoneal-ligaments-and-spaces]]

questions.questionText: Which of following space is relative not direct extent to pelvic space?

options.text: Right inframesocolic spaces
Left inframesocolic spaces
Right paracolic gutter
Left paracolic gutter

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；RadioGraphics 2012;32:437-451
questions.explanation:
**A（Right inframesocolic spaces）**——骨盆腔隙經左右結腸旁溝直接向上延伸,但與右/左腸繫膜下腔隙需經腸繫膜根部間接相通,非直接延伸關係。

(A) **正解**。
(B)(C)(D) 皆與骨盆腔隙有較直接的延伸關係。

→ [[peritoneal-ligaments-and-spaces]]

questions.questionText: Which one is wrong about evaluation of anterior cruciate ligament repair using MRI?

options.text: The inferior portion of the femoral tunnel should be located at the intersection of the lines along the posterior cortex of the femur and the roof of the intercondylar notch on sagittal MRI images
The femoral tunnel should open at the superolateral anterior margin of the intercondylar notch on coronal MRI images (posterior)
The tibial tunnel should be oriented parallel to the Blumensaat line on sagittal MRI images
The opening of the tibia tunnel should be completely posterior to Blumensaat line

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Kamel HA, Darwish. Evaluation of anterior cruciate ligament repair using magnetic resonance imaging. Medical Imaging and Radiology. 2014;2:6
questions.explanation:
**B為偽**——股骨隧道應開口於髁間窩的後上方(posterior),非前上方(anterior)。

(A) 矢狀面股骨隧道下緣定位法:真。
(B) **正解(偽)**:應為posterior非anterior。
(C) 脛骨隧道與Blumensaat線平行:真。
(D) 脛骨隧道開口完全位於Blumensaat線後方:真。

→ [[acl-reconstruction-tunnel-mri]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following description concerning with myelolipoma is true?

options.text: An uncommon benign tumor composed of mature adipose tissue and hematopoietic tissue
It can be large and symptomatic secondary to spontaneous hemorrhage
It may present as homogeneous, hyperintense masses on T1-weighted images with intermediate signal intensity on T2-weighted images
All of the above

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Adrenal Masses: MR Imaging Features with Pathologic Correlation, RadioGraphics 2004;24:S73-S86
questions.explanation:
**D（All of the above）**——myelolipoma為少見良性腫瘤(成熟脂肪+造血組織)、可因自發性出血致症狀性增大、MR呈T1均質高訊號/T2中等訊號皆為真實描述。

(A)(B)(C) 皆為真。
(D) **正解**。

→ [[adrenal-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following can be classified as adreniform masses? (intrinsic to the adrenal preserving the overall shape, adreniform)

options.text: Adrenal cortical hyperplasia
Adrenal hemorrhage
Pheochromocytoma
A and B

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Adrenal Masses: MR Imaging Features with Pathologic Correlation, RadioGraphics 2004;24:S73-S86
questions.explanation:
**D（A and B）**——cortical hyperplasia與adrenal hemorrhage皆保留腺體整體外形僅瀰漫增大。

(A)(B) 保留腺體外形:真,屬adreniform。
(C) Pheochromocytoma:扭曲/取代腺體外形,不屬adreniform。
(D) **正解**。

→ [[adrenal-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following description is true?

options.text: GRE T1-weighted chemical shift in-phase and out-of-phase imaging is helpful for differential diagnosis of adrenocortical adenoma

The pheochromocytoma shows the typical features of loss of signal intensity on GRE T1-weighted chemical shift out-of-phase image and intense enhancement on the contrast-enhanced image (no loss of signal on GRE/out of phase)
Adrenal cysts are common and are often detected during radiologic investigation or at autopsy. The frequency of adrenal cysts seen at autopsy studies ranges from 3% to 5% (rare; 0.064-0.018%)
None of the above

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Adrenal Masses: MR Imaging Features with Pathologic Correlation, RadioGraphics 2004;24:S73-S86
questions.explanation:
**A（GRE T1化學位移in/out-of-phase成像有助鑑別腎上腺皮質腺瘤）**——腺瘤含微觀脂肪致反相位訊號下降。

(A) **正解**。
(B) Pheochromocytoma不含脂肪,反相位無訊號掉落。
(C) Adrenal cysts屍檢盛行率罕見約0.064-0.018%(非3-5%)。
(D) 不適用。

→ [[chemical-shift-artifact]]

questions.questionText: Which one is the characteristic of pheochromocytoma?

options.text: GRE T1-weighted chemical shift out-of-phase imaging shows loss of signal intensity (pheochromocytomas do not contain a large amount of intracellular lipid)
Most lesions show intense enhancement after the administration of contrast material
Most lesions demonstrate low signal intensity on T2-weighted images (high, lightbulb sign)
All of the above

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Adrenal Masses: MR Imaging Features with Pathologic Correlation, RadioGraphics 2004;24:S73-S86
questions.explanation:
**B（多數病灶顯著強化）**——pheochromocytoma不含大量微觀脂肪,反相位無訊號掉落;T2WI典型呈高訊號(lightbulb sign),非低訊號。

(A) 反相位不會訊號掉落:A敘述為錯誤描述。
(B) **正解**。
(C) T2應為高訊號非低訊號。
(D) 不適用。

→ [[adrenal-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Larmor equation 表示 magnetic moment vector 的 precession frequency 與外加磁場的關係如下 ω₀=γB₀，請於下圖選擇 precession 的方向為何

options.text: 圖中A方向（與μ向量固定夾角、環繞B₀軸的圓錐狀進動路徑）
圖中B方向
圖中C方向
圖中D方向

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Magnetic Resonance Imaging, Physical Principles and Sequence Design, 1999, p.3-4
questions.explanation:
**A**——呈現與μ向量固定夾角、環繞B₀軸的圓錐狀進動路徑，符合陀螺般錐狀擺動的物理定義。

→ [[mri-larmor-precession]]

questions.questionText: When patient with abnormal low PT or INR on schedule for vascular intervention, best strategy for correction is fresh frozen plasma given at:

options.text: 3 days before vascular intervention
The night before vascular intervention
Shortly before and/or during vascular intervention
The second day after vascular intervention

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Expert Radiology Series: Image-Guided Interventions, p.40
questions.explanation:
**C（緊接手術前及/或手術中）**——FFP效果短暫,須緊鄰手術時機給予才能於操作當下提供足夠矯正效果。

(A)(B)(D) 皆因給予時機與手術操作時間相距過遠,凝血因子效果已消退或尚未發揮作用。
(C) **正解**。

→ [[periprocedural-coagulopathy-correction]]

questions.questionText: Using balloon catheter for vascular intervention, which one of the following carry the greatest risk for vascular rupture?

options.text: Low compliance balloon in small vessel
Low compliance balloon in large vessel
High compliance balloon in large vessel
High compliance balloon in small vessel

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Expert Radiology Series: Image-Guided Interventions, p.75-81
questions.explanation:
**B（Low compliance balloon in large vessel）**——低順應性氣球充氣壓力增加時直徑變化小、可耐高壓，用於大血管時若尺寸誤判，破裂風險最高。

(A)(C)(D) 風險相對較低。
(B) **正解**。

→ [[balloon-catheter-compliance]]

questions.questionText: To prevent Contrast Agent–Induced Nephropathy (CIN), the most widely accepted method is:

options.text: Hydration
Steroid
Furosemide
Hemodialysis

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Expert Radiology Series: Image-Guided Interventions, p.210
questions.explanation:
⚠️ 官方原答案標示C(Furosemide),頁緣紅筆加註存疑更正「A??」(不確定)。現行共識以Hydration(A)為CIN預防最廣被接受方法;furosemide非推薦常規手段(可能增加腎損傷風險);steroid無充分實證;hemodialysis屬治療性非預防性。建議醫師查證最新指引確認本題最終答案。

→ [[contrast-induced-nephropathy-prevention]]

questions.questionText: Which description about "neonatal lung disease" is incorrect?

options.text: The cause of hyaline membrane disease (HMD) (or respiratory distress syndrome (RDS)) is immature type II alveolar cells
Pleural effusions should not be seen with HMD
Retained fetal lung fluid (transient tachypnea of newborn) is caused by inadequate clearance of lung fluid prior to first breath
Meconium aspiration syndrome usual in preterm infants

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解
questions.explanation:
**D為偽**——MAS好發足月或過期產嬰兒(非早產兒),發生率隨妊娠週數增加而上升(31週後遞增)。

(A) HMD因第二型肺泡細胞不成熟:真。
(B) HMD不應合併肋膜積液:真。
(C) TTN因出生前肺液清除不完全:真。
(D) **正解(偽)**。

→ [[neonatal-lung-disease]]

questions.questionText: Which one is not the differential diagnosis of bilaterally enlarged kidneys on ultrasound?

options.text: Nephroblastomatosis
Polycystic kidney disease
Lymphoma/Leukemia
Chronic pyelonephritis

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解
questions.explanation:
**D（Chronic pyelonephritis）**——慢性腎盂腎炎造成腎臟疤痕化萎縮縮小(非腫大)。

(A)(B)(C) 皆為雙側腎臟腫大之常見鑑別診斷。
(D) **正解**。

→ [[bilateral-enlarged-kidneys-ddx]]

questions.questionText: Which one is not the correct description about "infantile hypertrophic pyloric stenosis(IHPS)?

options.text: Male predominance (Males: females 4:1 to 6:1)
It typically occurs soon after birth (symptoms usually begin between 3 and 5 weeks of age, and very rarely occur after 12 weeks of age)
Manifested by non-bilious vomiting
Radiographic findings include marked gastric dilatation disproportionate to small bowel gas

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解
questions.explanation:
**B為偽**——IHPS並非出生後不久發病,症狀典型於出生後3-5週開始,極罕見於12週後才發病。

(A) 男性好發4:1至6:1:真。
(B) **正解(偽)**。
(C) 非膽汁性嘔吐:真。
(D) X光顯著胃擴張與小腸氣體量不成比例:真。

→ [[pyloric-stenosis]]

questions.questionText: Which one is not the common cause of bowed legs in children?

options.text: Physiologic
Rickets
Muscular weakness
Blount disease

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解
questions.explanation:
**C（Muscular weakness）**——並非弓形腿的常見病因機轉。

(A) Physiologic:最常見病因。
(B) Rickets:常見病理性病因。
(C) **正解**。
(D) Blount disease:脛骨幹骺端-骨骺角度>11度,重要鑑別。

→ [[bowed-legs-children-ddx]]
